title: [Origin] Phantom/Dragon Hybrid
description: Be a stealthy Phantom trickster, a powerful Dragon warrior, or both at once! With fully custom flight mechanics, no need to bring fireworks!
body:
Ever wanted to be as stealthy and annoying as a Phantom? Or maybe strong and fearsome like a dragon? With this datapack, you can be either one or both at the same time!

This datapack contains three origins:
* The stealthy and tricky **Phantom**
* The powerful and fearsome **Dragon**
* The **Hybrid** that combines the powers of both!

## Requires:
- [**Origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) (up to Minecraft 1.20.2)
- [**Apugli**](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli)
- [**Pehkui**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- Fabric only: [**Origins Extra Keybinds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-extra-keybinds-fabric)
- Forge only: [**Extra Keybinds 1.1**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-keybinds)

Note: The Extra Keybinds mods are _technically_ not required, but you won't be able to use certain powers without them.

## 🐉 The Dragon's powers (for Dragon and Hybrid):
- **Draconic Genes** (_Nonary_) - due to your draconic ancestry, you've grown to a height of around 2.2 blocks (use the keybind in case your size is not correct, usually needed after dying)
- **Tough Scales** - your scaly hide provides an extra layer of defense, giving you 5 armour and 8 toughness
- **Fire Resistance** - your scales can easily withstand the heat of fire, but lava can still penetrate them
- **Sharp Claws** - when not holding any item, you deal 6 damage total and dig much faster thanks to your claws
- **Fire Breath** (_Primary_) - you can shoot out a stream of small fireballs (_uses its own resource_)
- **Raw Carnivore** - as a dragon, you're much better at digesting raw meat, resulting in much more food and saturation points gained, but cooked meat and any non-meat foods (excluding potions) will have adverse effects
- **Dragon's Belly** - a dragon can survive a long time after a hearty meal, making food depletion much slower when you're full, but when you're hungry, you better find food soon

## 👻 The Phantom's powers (for Phantom and Hybrid):
- **Phantom-like Appearance** - wild Phantoms will recognize you as a friend and refuse to attack you
- **Summon Phantoms** (_Quinary_) - you can summon 3 wild Phantoms once per night to annoy your friends
- **Phantom Voice** (_Quaternary_) - you can screech like a Phantom to scare other people, and you sound like a Phantom when getting hurt, dying, or attacking during flight
- **Part Undead** - because Phantoms are undead, the Smite enchantment affects you too
- **Invisibility** (_Secondary_) - you can turn invisible, making you unnoticeable even to mobs, but only in dark enough areas (_low cost of food_)
- **Night Vision** - being a creature of the night, you can see in the dark more easily
- **Photosensitivity** - due to sensitive eyes, bright lights will prevent you from falling asleep

## 🦅 Flight mechanics (for all three origins):
- **Glide** - you can glide on your wings as if you were wearing Elytra (very small cost of food)
- **Fly** (hold _Forward_) - you can flap your wings to actively accelerate forward, but only as long as you have enough energy in you (moderate cost of food)
- **Sprint** (hold _Forward_ + _Sprint_) - you can accelerate even faster (high cost of food)
- **Uplift** (hold _Jump_) - put some extra energy into your wing flaps to fly upwards (very high cost of food)
- **Slow Down** (hold _Back_) - reduce your momentum to not crash into a wall (small cost of food)
- **Death From Above** - you cut extra deep when flying, dealing increased damage
- **Armour's Weight** - armour slows you down during flight depending on the armour stat (i.e. the tougher your armour, the more gravity will pull you down)
